Requirement: Principles of processing (lawfulness fairness transparency purpose limitation data minimisation accuracy storage limitation integrity confidentiality accountability)
Lawful basis required for each processing activity
Information to data subjects at collection
Evidence: Privacy notice on website + HR handbook

Requirement: Data subject rights (access rectification erasure restriction portability objection)
Responsibility of controller + privacy by design
Processor contracts (DPA) required
Evidence: Data processing agreements with all processors

Requirement: Records of processing activities
Security of processing (appropriate technical and organisational measures)
Breach notification to supervisory authority within 72 hours
Evidence: Incident Response Plan breach section + log

Requirement: Breach notification to affected data subjects (if high risk)
Data protection impact assessment required for high-risk processing
Designation and tasks of data protection officer
Transfers to third countries require legal basis (SCC adequacy BCR)
Governance: management bodies must approve and supervise risk measures and take training
Evidence: Management training record + approved ISMS docs

Requirement: Appropriate and proportionate technical operational and organisational measures
Risk analysis and information system security policies
Evidence: Risk Management Policy + Information Security Policy

Requirement: Incident handling
Business continuity (backup management disaster recovery crisis management)
Supply chain security including supplier and service provider relationships
Security in network and information systems acquisition development and maintenance including vulnerability handling and disclosure
Policies and procedures to assess effectiveness of cybersecurity risk measures
Basic cyber hygiene practices and cybersecurity training
Policies and procedures on use of cryptography and where appropriate encryption
Human resources security access control policies and asset management
Evidence: HR Security + Access Control + Asset Mgmt

Requirement: Use of MFA or continuous auth solutions secured voice/video/text communications and secured emergency communications
Early warning (24h) incident notification (72h) intermediate report final report (1 month)
Registration with competent authority
